---
title: "Example"
author: "Inayat Gill"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Introduction

This is a simple quarto document demonstrating HTML output.

```{r}

# A basic R computation

library(palmerpenguins)
summary(penguins)

```

## Analysis


This section combines work from both branches. It provides summary table and mean calculation.

```{r}

summary(penguins$body_mass)

mean(penguins$body_mass, na.rm = TRUE)

```
